  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Safety Technician",
  "description": "Red Offshore Nigeria was incorporated in 2008 as a pure ship brokerage company. Over the years, our expansion brought vessel&nbsp;&nbsp;management, crewing, and asset acquisition to our growing track record.&nbsp;

Today, we are a 100% Nigerian-owned, fully integrated indigenous operator recognised and certified by every major regulatory authority in our operating regions. We pride ourselves on complete transparency &mdash; no hidden costs, no grey areas.

We are currently&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting experienced offshore personnels for an ongoing project in Nigeria in the capacity below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Safety Technician
Project Ref.: 10286
Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-Time

Requirements


	Relevant offshore and marine industry experience
	Valid STCW certification (mandatory)
	Valid BOSIET and HUET certification (preferred)


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to crewing@redoffshore.eu using &quot;Nigeria &ndash; Project Ref. 10286&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-12",

Safety Technician Job at Red Offshore Nigeria




        
    

        
        Red Offshore Nigeria was incorporated in 2008 as a pure ship brokerage company. Over the years, our expansion brought vessel  management, crewing, and asset acquisition to our growing track record. 

Today, we are a 100% Nigerian-owned, fully integrated indigenous operator recognised and certified by every major regulatory authority in our operating regions. We pride ourselves on complete transparency — no hidden costs, no grey areas.

We are currently  recruiting experienced offshore personnels for an ongoing project in Nigeria in the capacity below:

 Job Position: Safety Technician
Project Ref.: 10286
Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-Time
     

            
    



Requirements


	Relevant offshore and marine industry experience
	Valid STCW certification (mandatory)
	Valid BOSIET and HUET certification (preferred)


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to [email protected] using "Nigeria – Project Ref. 10286" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Learning & Development Consultant",
  "description": "UnoCasa is a full service Human Resources&nbsp;&nbsp;Consultancy business with focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning &amp; Development and Consultancy services. Our raison d&rsquo;etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplish your business goals.&nbsp;

We are not your run of the mill HR Company, we believe in team diversity and teamwork; we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team; and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation&rsquo;s needs.

Our clients are in various sectors not limited to engineering,&nbsp;&nbsp;education, health oil &amp; gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle,&nbsp;&nbsp;consultancy firms and services

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Learning &amp; Development Consultant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time / Hybrid

Description


	We are seeking an experienced Learning &amp; Development Consultant to join a dynamic consulting team focused on helping organizations improve performance, leadership effectiveness.
	This role is ideal for a commercially minded professional who can diagnose organizational challenges, design impactful learning and development solutions, engage senior stakeholders, and drive business growth through consultative client engagement.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct client needs assessments and organizational diagnosis
	Design tailored learning, leadership, and Business development solutions&nbsp;
	Develop proposals, presentations, and client engagement strategies
	Drive business development and manage a portfolio of client opportunities
	Build and grow lasting client relationships
	Collaborate with delivery teams to ensure successful implementation and measurable impact.


Qualification &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in a relevant discipline
	7 - 10 years of experience in Learning &amp; Development, Organizational Development, HR Advisory, Management Consulting, or a related field
	Proven experience in client-facing consulting, solution design, and stakeholder engagement
	Strong proposal writing, presentation, and business development skills
	Excellent communication, analytical, and relationship management abilities
	Willingness to travel as required.


Note


	Qualified candidates are encouraged to apply.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	Please feel free to share this opportunity within your network or with anyone who may be a great fit for the role
	If you are passionate about solving business challenges, developing people, and driving organizational growth, we&#39;d love to hear from you.
",

Learning & Development Consultant Job at UnoCasa Limited




        
    

        
        UnoCasa is a full service Human Resources  Consultancy business with focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning & Development and Consultancy services. Our raison d’etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplish your business goals. 

We are not your run of the mill HR Company, we believe in team diversity and teamwork; we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team; and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation’s needs.
     

            
    



Our clients are in various sectors not limited to engineering,  education, health oil & gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle,  consultancy firms and services

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Learning & Development Consultant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time / Hybrid

Description


	We are seeking an experienced Learning & Development Consultant to join a dynamic consulting team focused on helping organizations improve performance, leadership effectiveness.
	This role is ideal for a commercially minded professional who can diagnose organizational challenges, design impactful learning and development solutions, engage senior stakeholders, and drive business growth through consultative client engagement.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct client needs assessments and organizational diagnosis
	Design tailored learning, leadership, and Business development solutions 
	Develop proposals, presentations, and client engagement strategies
	Drive business development and manage a portfolio of client opportunities
	Build and grow lasting client relationships
	Collaborate with delivery teams to ensure successful implementation and measurable impact.


Qualification & Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in a relevant discipline
	7 - 10 years of experience in Learning & Development, Organizational Development, HR Advisory, Management Consulting, or a related field
	Proven experience in client-facing consulting, solution design, and stakeholder engagement
	Strong proposal writing, presentation, and business development skills
	Excellent communication, analytical, and relationship management abilities
	Willingness to travel as required.


Note


	Qualified candidates are encouraged to apply.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	Please feel free to share this opportunity within your network or with anyone who may be a great fit for the role
	If you are passionate about solving business challenges, developing people, and driving organizational growth, we'd love to hear from you.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Manager",
  "description": "Mariji Constructions Limited, a Nigerian construction and civil engineering company is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job position: Project Manager

Job Location: Nigeria

Description


	We are seeking an experienced professionals to join our growing team for upcoming industrial and construction projects in Nigeria.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualification with 15&ndash;20 years of experience&nbsp;
	Proven ability to manage construction projects independently from inception to completion.
	Mandatory experience in industrial/pharmaceutical building projects.
	Strong leadership, planning, scheduling, and client management skills.
	Working knowledge of project management and construction software.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@marijiconstructionsltd.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-11",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-12",

Project Manager Job at Mariji Constructions Limited




        
    

        
        Mariji Constructions Limited, a Nigerian construction and civil engineering company is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job position: Project Manager

Job Location: Nigeria

Description


	We are seeking an experienced professionals to join our growing team for upcoming industrial and construction projects in Nigeria.


Requirements
     

            
    




	Candidates should possess relevant qualification with 15–20 years of experience 
	Proven ability to manage construction projects independently from inception to completion.
	Mandatory experience in industrial/pharmaceutical building projects.
	Strong leadership, planning, scheduling, and client management skills.
	Working knowledge of project management and construction software.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are on a mission to provide qualitative, innovative, and integrated services for women and children, using state of the art equipment and motivated personnel to exceed our clientele&rsquo;s expectation at affordable prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	An exceptionally smart, articulate, and fast-learning professional who will provide high-level administrative and executive support to the Medical Director.
	The candidate must be highly organized, capable of grasping complex medical and operational processes rapidly, and handle tasks with absolute discretion.


Responsibilities


	Manage and coordinate the Medical Director&rsquo;s schedule, meetings, and agendas
	Act as an articulate liaison between the Medical Director, staff, and external stakeholders
	Draft, review, and manage highly professional correspondence, memos, and reports
	Rapidly learn hospital workflows to execute executive directives efficiently
	Prepare meeting materials, take accurate minutes, and track follow-up actions
	Maintain strict confidentiality of all executive, medical, and administrative data
	Screen and manage phone calls, inquiries, and visitors with high intellect and professionalism
	Organize and maintain secure executive digital and physical filing systems
	Assist in compiling data for operational, departmental, or financial reports
	Handle sensitive tasks and ad-hoc administrative projects swiftly.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in PDF to: kaafmlmclagos@outlook.com using &ldquo;Personal Assistant&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Personal Assistant Job at KAAF Specialist Hospital




        
    

        
        KAAF Specialist Hospital is a highly ethical organization, providing Obstetric and Gynaecological, Paediatric, and other healthcare services, with a commitment to excellence and integrity. We are on a mission to provide qualitative, innovative, and integrated services for women and children, using state of the art equipment and motivated personnel to exceed our clientele’s expectation at affordable prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	An exceptionally smart, articulate, and fast-learning professional who will provide high-level administrative and executive support to the Medical Director.
	The candidate must be highly organized, capable of grasping complex medical and operational processes rapidly, and handle tasks with absolute discretion.


Responsibilities


	Manage and coordinate the Medical Director’s schedule, meetings, and agendas
	Act as an articulate liaison between the Medical Director, staff, and external stakeholders
	Draft, review, and manage highly professional correspondence, memos, and reports
	Rapidly learn hospital workflows to execute executive directives efficiently
	Prepare meeting materials, take accurate minutes, and track follow-up actions
	Maintain strict confidentiality of all executive, medical, and administrative data
	Screen and manage phone calls, inquiries, and visitors with high intellect and professionalism
	Organize and maintain secure executive digital and physical filing systems
	Assist in compiling data for operational, departmental, or financial reports
	Handle sensitive tasks and ad-hoc administrative projects swiftly.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in PDF to: [email protected] using “Personal Assistant” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer / Storekeeper",
  "description": "KAAF Specialist Hospital is a highly ethical organization, providing Obstetric and Gynaecological, Paediatric, and other healthcare services, with a commitment to excellence and integrity. We are on a mission to provide qualitative, innovative, and integrated services for women and children, using state of the art equipment and motivated personnel to exceed our clientele&rsquo;s expectation at affordable prices.&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Procurement Officer / Storekeeper

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The store keeper shall participate and oversee the ordering, receiving, inspecting, storing, issuing and shipping of equipment, materials and supplies for various departments.


Duties &amp; Responsibilities


	Maintain and verify all transactions in the store.
	Maintains a record of stock received and issued to departments.
	Compile orders for purchasing and verify the receipt of orders with Accounts Payable.
	Researches cost, quality and availability of goods, selects the appropriate goods and vendors, and then submit requisition that comply with the department&#39;s budgetary guidelines.
	Monitor the storeroom budget.
	Inspects and verifies that received stock meets specifications and that orders are complete.
	Resolves order problems with vendors and departments, as necessary.
	Stores articles by style, size, material, etc. according to departmental procedures.
	Rotates supplies to ensure that items do not expire before use.
	Maintains a clean, sanitary and orderly storeroom.
	May make decisions regarding the physical layout of the storeroom.
	Performs inventory of stock room supplies on a weekly and semi-annual basis and update on HMIS.
	Conduct inventory maintenance and determine redistribution actions for stored goods when necessary.
	Document storeroom operations for billing and inventory control.
	Performs various clerical duties such as data entry of requisitions and receipts
	Answers staff questions regarding storeroom activities, as required, to ensure that quality service is delivered.
	Assists staff in evaluating new products and suggests product substitutions when necessary.
	Liaise with departments in planning the range and quality of materials to be stocked.


Job Requirements&nbsp;


	Must possess at least a Bachelor&#39;s Degree in any related discipline
	Must have at least 2year experience in store keeping/inventory management
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office.


Salary
N160,000 - N180,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in PDF to: kaafmlmclagos@outlook.com using &ldquo;Procurement Officer / Storekeeper&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Procurement Officer / Storekeeper Job at KAAF Specialist Hospital




        
    

        
        KAAF Specialist Hospital is a highly ethical organization, providing Obstetric and Gynaecological, Paediatric, and other healthcare services, with a commitment to excellence and integrity. We are on a mission to provide qualitative, innovative, and integrated services for women and children, using state of the art equipment and motivated personnel to exceed our clientele’s expectation at affordable prices. 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Procurement Officer / Storekeeper

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The store keeper shall participate and oversee the ordering, receiving, inspecting, storing, issuing and shipping of equipment, materials and supplies for various departments.


Duties & Responsibilities


	Maintain and verify all transactions in the store.
	Maintains a record of stock received and issued to departments.
	Compile orders for purchasing and verify the receipt of orders with Accounts Payable.
	Researches cost, quality and availability of goods, selects the appropriate goods and vendors, and then submit requisition that comply with the department's budgetary guidelines.
	Monitor the storeroom budget.
	Inspects and verifies that received stock meets specifications and that orders are complete.
	Resolves order problems with vendors and departments, as necessary.
	Stores articles by style, size, material, etc. according to departmental procedures.
	Rotates supplies to ensure that items do not expire before use.
	Maintains a clean, sanitary and orderly storeroom.
	May make decisions regarding the physical layout of the storeroom.
	Performs inventory of stock room supplies on a weekly and semi-annual basis and update on HMIS.
	Conduct inventory maintenance and determine redistribution actions for stored goods when necessary.
	Document storeroom operations for billing and inventory control.
	Performs various clerical duties such as data entry of requisitions and receipts
	Answers staff questions regarding storeroom activities, as required, to ensure that quality service is delivered.
	Assists staff in evaluating new products and suggests product substitutions when necessary.
	Liaise with departments in planning the range and quality of materials to be stocked.


Job Requirements 


	Must possess at least a Bachelor's Degree in any related discipline
	Must have at least 2year experience in store keeping/inventory management
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office.


Salary
N160,000 - N180,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in PDF to: [email protected] using “Procurement Officer / Storekeeper” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
